body:
# Create: Pipe Networks
![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.20.1-blue)
![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-47.4.0-blueviolet)
[![MIT License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green)](LICENSE)
![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-Coming%20Soon-lightgrey?logo=modrinth)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1304628?logo=curseforge)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-pipe-networks)

![screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wAHTll1s/images/f8e253a52e6b755c64526a0d2363e0d8cd67f6b6_350.webp)

Organize your pipes!

**Create: Pipe Networks** is an addon for the [Create mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) that expands the fluid logistics system with **color-coded pipes**. Each pipe will connect to vanilla create fluid pipes, but not with pipes of a different color.

## ✨ Features

*   🎨 16 color variants of fluid pipes
*   🧩 Compatibility with [Create: The Factory Must Grow](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-industry)
*   ♻️ Backported create 0.5.1.j  version available.

## 🛠️ Coming Soon

*   🆕 1.21 support planned
*   🔧 Wrench-based toggling to hide or show the color.
*   ➡️ Directional arrows for flow indication.



🧪 *I'm new to modding—please report any issues or share suggestions!*



***

## 🧾 License

This mod is open-source and licensed under the MIT License.

## 🙌 Acknowledgments

Create Mod Team – for building the best automation mod

> Create: Pipe Networks is a Create mod addon. It does not function on its own.
